wikipedia.title: Northampton
wikipedia.summary: Northampton is a town and civil parish in Northamptonshire, England. It is the county town of Northamptonshire and the administrative centre of the unitary authority of West Northamptonshire. The town is situated on the River Nene, 60 miles (97 km) north-west of London and 50 miles (80 km) south-eas

wikipedia.title: Berkeley, California
wikipedia.summary: Berkeley is a city on the eastern shore of San Francisco Bay in northern Alameda County, California, United States.
